chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2717 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.11877/2015 2. For hearing of main case 22.01.2025 Mr. Agha Zafar Ahmed advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench order dated 08.03.2021 of this Court in the case of Hyundai Merchant Marine Co., Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan (CP D 6145 to 6150 of 2018), therefore, this petition may be disposed of in the same terms subject to the right of appeal before the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge Amjad
